import os, re, glob, collections

BASE = r'C:\\users\\aagos\\radiance_page_generators\\generators\\public_html'
IMG_DIR = os.path.join\(BASE, 'uploads', 'images', 'products'\)
all_images = set\(os.listdir\(IMG_DIR\)\)

# Check for broken asset paths
print\("=== BROKEN ASSET PATHS ==="\)
for htmlf in sorted\(glob.glob\(os.path.join\(BASE, '*.html'\)\)\):
    with open\(htmlf, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'\) as f:
        content = f.read\(\)
    if 'assets/images/products/' in content or 'assets/images/categories/' in content:
        print\(f"  {os.path.basename\(htmlf\)}"\)

# Check for images referenced but not existing
print\("\\n=== MISSING IMAGE FILES ==="\)
missing = set\(\)
for htmlf in sorted\(glob.glob\(os.path.join\(BASE, '*.html'\)\)\):
    with open\(htmlf, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'\) as f:
        content = f.read\(\)
    refs = re.findall\(r'uploads/images/products/\([a-z0-9\\-]+\\.webp\)', content\)
    for ref in refs:
        if ref not in all_images:
            missing.add\(ref\)
            print\(f"  {os.path.basename\(htmlf\)}: references non-existent {ref}"\)

# Check for repeat image assignments on DIFFERENT products
print\("\\n=== IMAGES SHARED BY UNRELATED PRODUCTS \(top issues\) ==="\)
page_hero = {}
for htmlf in sorted\(glob.glob\(os.path.join\(BASE, '*.html'\)\)\):
    bname = os.path.basename\(htmlf\)
    if bname in ['index.html', 'Product.html', 'Certification.html', 'Contact.html', 'blog.html', 'blog-post.html', 'blog-admin.html', 'agro-export-india.html']:
        continue
    with open\(htmlf, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'\) as f:
        content = f.read\(\)
    m = re.search\(r"sp-hero-bg.*?url\\\('uploads/images/products/\([^']+\)'\\\)", content\)
    if not m:
        m = re.search\(r"--hero-bg:url\\\('uploads/images/products/\([^']+\)'\\\)", content\)
    if m:
        page_hero[bname] = m.group\(1\)

img_users = collections.defaultdict\(list\)
for page, img in page_hero.items\(\):
    img_users[img].append\(page\)

for img, pages in sorted\(img_users.items\(\)\):
    if len\(pages\) > 3:  # Only flag if shared by many unrelated pages
        cats = set\(\)
        for p in pages:
            cats.add\(p.split\('-'\)[0]\)
        if len\(cats\) > 1:
            print\(f"\\n  {img} \({len\(pages\)} pages across {len\(cats\)} categories\):"\)
            for p in pages[:5]:
                print\(f"    - {p}"\)
            if len\(pages\) > 5:
                print\(f"    ... and {len\(pages\)-5} more"\)

print\("\\n=== SUMMARY ==="\)
print\(f"Total product images: {len\(all_images\)}"\)
print\(f"Missing image files: {len\(missing\)}"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python << 'PYEOF'
import os, re, glob, collections

BASE = r'C:\\users\\aagos\\radiance_page_generators\\generators\\public_html'
IMG_DIR = os.path.join\(BASE, 'uploads', 'images', 'products'\)
all_images = set\(os.listdir\(IMG_DIR\)\)

# For every product/grade page, get the hero image
page_hero = {}
for htmlf in sorted\(glob.glob\(os.path.join\(BASE, '*.html'\)\)\):
    bname = os.path.basename\(htmlf\)
    if bname in ['index.html', 'Product.html', 'Certification.html', 'Contact.html', 
                  'blog.html', 'blog-post.html', 'blog-admin.html', 'agro-export-india.html']:
        continue
    with open\(htmlf, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'\) as f:
        content = f.read\(\)
    m = re.search\(r"sp-hero-bg.*?url\\\('uploads/images/products/\([^']+\)'\\\)", content\)
    if not m:
        m = re.search\(r"--hero-bg:url\\\('uploads/images/products/\([^']+\)'\\\)", content\)
    if m:
        page_hero[bname] = m.group\(1\)

# Find images used by multiple pages
img_users = collections.defaultdict\(list\)
for page, img in page_hero.items\(\):
    img_users[img].append\(page\)

# Show ALL repeated images \(shared by 2+ pages\)
print\("=== ALL SHARED IMAGES \(same image on multiple pages\) ===\\n"\)
for img, pages in sorted\(img_users.items\(\), key=lambda x: -len\(x[1]\)\):
    if len\(pages\) > 1:
        # Determine if these are related pages \(parent/child in same hierarchy\)
        # or actually different products
        print\(f"  {img} \({len\(pages\)} pages\):"\)
        for p in sorted\(pages\):
            print\(f"    - {p}"\)
        print\(\)

# Count unique vs shared
unique = sum\(1 for pages in img_users.values\(\) if len\(pages\) == 1\)
shared = sum\(1 for pages in img_users.values\(\) if len\(pages\) > 1\)
total_pages_with_shared = sum\(len\(pages\) for pages in img_users.values\(\) if len\(pages\) > 1\)
print\(f"\\n=== STATS ==="\)
print\(f"Pages with unique hero images: counted from {unique} unique images"\)
print\(f"Images shared across multiple pages: {shared}"\)
print\(f"Total pages affected by sharing: {total_pages_with_shared}"\)
print\(f"Total pages with hero images: {len\(page_hero\)}"\)
PYEOF)

import os, re, glob

BASE = r'C:\\users\\aagos\\radiance_page_generators\\generators\\public_html'

# Check turmeric and red chilli powder pages specifically
check_pages = [
    'spices-powdered-spices-turmeric-powder.html',
    'spices-powdered-spices-red-chilli-powder.html',
    'spices-powdered-spices-coriander-powder-grade.html',
    'spices-powdered-spices-cumin-powder-grade.html',
    'spices-powdered-spices-ginger-powder-grade.html',
    'spices-powdered-spices.html',
]

for page in check_pages:
    filepath = os.path.join\(BASE, page\)
    if not os.path.exists\(filepath\):
        continue
    with open\(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'\) as f:
        content = f.read\(\)
    imgs = set\(re.findall\(r'uploads/images/products/\([a-z0-9\\-]+\\.webp\)', content\)\)
    # Get hero image
    m = re.search\(r"sp-hero-bg.*?url\\\('uploads/images/products/\([^']+\)'\\\)", content\)
    hero = m.group\(1\) if m else 'NONE'
    print\(f"{page}"\)
    print\(f"  Hero: {hero}"\)
    print\(f"  All imgs: {imgs}"\)
    print\(\)

# Also check all powdered spice grade pages
print\("=== ALL POWDERED SPICE PAGES ==="\)
for htmlf in sorted\(glob.glob\(os.path.join\(BASE, 'spices-powdered-spices-*.html'\)\)\):
    bname = os.path.basename\(htmlf\)
    with open\(htmlf, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'\) as f:
        content = f.read\(\)
    m = re.search\(r"sp-hero-bg.*?url\\\('uploads/images/products/\([^']+\)'\\\)", content\)
    if not m:
        m = re.search\(r"--hero-bg:url\\\('uploads/images/products/\([^']+\)'\\\)", content\)
    hero = m.group\(1\) if m else 'NONE'

Bash(python << 'PYEOF'
import os, re, glob

BASE = r'C:\\users\\aagos\\radiance_page_generators\\generators\\public_html'
IMG_DIR = os.path.join\(BASE, 'uploads', 'images', 'products'\)
all_images = set\(os.listdir\(IMG_DIR\)\)

skip = ['index.html', 'Product.html', 'Certification.html', 'Contact.html', 
        'blog.html', 'blog-post.html', 'blog-admin.html', 'agro-export-india.html',
        'sitemap.xml', 'robots.txt']

no_hero = []
missing_files = []
total = 0

for htmlf in sorted\(glob.glob\(os.path.join\(BASE, '*.html'\)\)\):
    bname = os.path.basename\(htmlf\)
    if bname in skip:
        continue
    total += 1
    
    with open\(htmlf, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'\) as f:
        content = f.read\(\)
    
    # Find ANY product image reference
    all_refs = re.findall\(r'uploads/images/products/\([a-z0-9\\-\\.]+\\.webp\)', content\)
    
    if not all_refs:
        no_hero.append\(bname\)
        continue
    
    for ref in set\(all_refs\):
        if ref not in all_images:
            missing_files.append\(\(bname, ref\)\)

print\(f"Total product pages checked: {total}"\)
print\(f"Pages with NO product images at all: {len\(no_hero\)}"\)
if no_hero:
    for p in no_hero:
        print\(f"  - {p}"\)

print\(f"\\nReferences to non-existent image files: {len\(missing_files\)}"\)
if missing_files:
    for p, img in missing_files:
        print\(f"  - {p}: {img}"\)

print\(f"\\nTotal product images available: {len\(all_images\)}"\)
print\(f"\\nAll pages have correct, existing images: {'YES' if not no_hero and not missing_files else 'NO'}"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(cd "C:/users/aagos/radiance_page_generators/generators/public_html" && python -c "
import glob, os

BASE = r'C:\\users\\aagos\\radiance_page_generators\\generators\\public_html'
count = 0
files_changed = 0

for htmlf in sorted\(glob.glob\(os.path.join\(BASE, '*.html'\)\)\):
    with open\(htmlf, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'\) as f:
        content = f.read\(\)
    if 'Other Crude Drugs' not in content:
        continue
    new_content = content.replace\('Other Crude Drugs', 'Other Animal Feeds'\)
    occurrences = content.count\('Other Crude Drugs'\)
    count += occurrences
    files_changed += 1
    with open\(htmlf, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
        f.write\(new_content\)

print\(f'Replaced {count} occurrences across {files_changed} files'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s "https://www.googleapis.com/pagespeedonline/v5/runPagespeed?url=https://greenyellow-kudu-570127.hostingersite.com/&strategy=desktop&category=performance" 2>/dev/null | python -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)

# Overall score
score = data['lighthouseResult']['categories']['performance']['score']
print\(f'PERFORMANCE SCORE: {int\(score*100\)}'\)
print\(\)

# Metrics
metrics = data['lighthouseResult']['audits']
key_metrics = ['first-contentful-paint','largest-contentful-paint','total-blocking-time',
               'cumulative-layout-shift','speed-index','server-response-time','interactive']
print\('=== CORE METRICS ==='\)
for k in key_metrics:
    if k in metrics:
        m = metrics[k]
        print\(f'  {m[\\"title\\"]}: {m.get\(\\"displayValue\\",\\"N/A\\"\)} \(score: {m.get\(\\"score\\",\\"N/A\\"\)}\)'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== FAILED/WARNING AUDITS \(opportunities\) ==='\)
for key, audit in sorted\(metrics.items\(\)\):
    sc = audit.get\('score'\)
    if sc is not None and sc < 0.9 and audit.get\('details',{}\).get\('type'\) in ['opportunity','table','list']:
        savings = audit.get\('details',{}\).get\('overallSavingsMs',''\)
        savings_str = f' [save ~{int\(savings\)}ms]' if savings else ''
        print\(f'  [{int\(sc*100\) if sc else 0}] {audit[\\"title\\"]}{savings_str}'\)
        # Show items
        items = audit.get\('details',{}\).get\('items',[]\)
        for item in items[:5]:
            url = item.get\('url',''\) or item.get\('source',{}\).get\('url',''\)
            wb = item.get\('wastedBytes',''\)
            wms = item.get\('wastedMs',''\)
            total = item.get\('totalBytes',''\)
            if url:
                short = url[:120]
                extras = []
                if wb: extras.append\(f'wasted: {int\(wb/1024\)}KB'\)
                if wms: extras.append\(f'delay: {int\(wms\)}ms'\)
                if total: extras.append\(f'total: {int\(total/1024\)}KB'\)
                print\(f'    {short}'\)
                if extras: print\(f'      {\\" | \\".join\(extras\)}'\)
        if len\(items\) > 5:
            print\(f'    ... and {len\(items\)-5} more'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== DIAGNOSTICS ==='\)
for key, audit in sorted\(metrics.items\(\)\):
    sc = audit.get\('score'\)
    if sc is not None and sc < 0.9 and audit.get\('details',{}\).get\('type'\) not in ['opportunity','table','list',None]:
        print\(f'  [{int\(sc*100\) if sc else 0}] {audit[\\"title\\"]}'\)
" 2>&1)

import urllib.request, ssl

ctx = ssl.create_default_context\(\)
headers = {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36'}

urls = {
    'eu-organic-logo-600x400.png': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/5/50/Organic-Logo.svg/600px-Organic-Logo.svg.png',
    'canada.png': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/5/5e/Canada_Organic_Logo.svg/480px-Canada_Organic_Logo.svg.png',
    'Organic4colorsealGIF1.gif': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/1d/USDA_organic_seal.svg/480px-USDA_organic_seal.svg.png',
    'india-organic.png': 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/5/5f/India_Organic_logo.png',
}

for fname, url in urls.items\(\):
    try:
        req = urllib.request.Request\(url, headers=headers\)
        data = urllib.request.urlopen\(req, context=ctx\).read\(\)
        path = '$CERTDIR/' + fname
        with open\(path, 'wb'\) as f:
            f.write\(data\)
        print\(f'OK: {fname} = {len\(data\)} bytes'\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'FAIL: {fname} = {e}'\)

certdir = r'C:\\users\\aagos\\radiance_page_generators\\generators\\public_html\\uploads\\certification'

    path = os.path.join\(certdir, 'gmp.png'\)

        f.write\(data\)

#!/bin/bash

# List of L2 subcategory files \(3-part names like category-subcategory-name.html\)
files=\(
  "spices-whole-spices.html"

Bash(python3 << 'PYSCRIPT'
import re
import os
from pathlib import Path

os.chdir\('/c/users/aagos/radiance_page_generators/generators/public_html'\)

# List of L2 subcategory files
subcategory_files = [
    "spices-whole-spices.html",
    "spices-powdered-spices.html",
    "spices-mixed-spices.html",
    "rice-basmati-rice.html",
    "rice-non-basmati-rice.html",
    "oil-seeds-groundnuts.html",
    "pulses-whole-pulses.html",
    "pulses-split-pulses.html",
    "herbs-leaves-flowers.html",
    "herbs-roots-rhizomes.html",
    "herbs-seeds.html",
    "herbs-seeds-babchi.html",
    "herbs-fruits-pods.html",
    "herbs-other.html",
    "herbs-other-catechu.html",
    "herbs-other-himej.html",
    "dry-fruits-raisins.html",
    "dry-fruits-cashews.html",
    "dry-fruits-walnuts.html",
    "dry-fruits-nutmeg.html",
    "cereals-flour-cereals.html",
    "cereals-flour-flour.html",
    "food-chemicals-food-additives.html",
    "dehydrated-products-whole.html",
    "dehydrated-products-powder.html",
    "animal-feed-other.html",
    "animal-feed-millets.html",
    "coffee-coffee-beans.html",
    "coffee-instant-coffee.html",
]

results = {}

for filename in subcategory_files:
    if not os.path.exists\(filename\):
        continue
    
    with open\(filename, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
        content = f.read\(\)
    
    # Find all pm-card blocks
    pattern = r'<a[^>]*id="\([^"]*\)"[^>]*href="\([^"]*\)"[^>]*class="pm-card"[^>]*>.*?<img[^>]*src="\([^"]*\)"[^>]*alt="\([^"]*\)"'
    matches = re.findall\(pattern, content, re.DOTALL\)
    
    if not matches:
        # Try alternative pattern without id
        pattern2 = r'<a[^>]*class="pm-card"[^>]*href="\([^"]*\)"[^>]*>.*?<img[^>]*src="\([^"]*\)"[^>]*alt="\([^"]*\)"'
        matches2 = re.findall\(pattern2, content, re.DOTALL\)
        if matches2:
            results[filename] = [\(None, href, src, alt\) for href, src, alt in matches2]
    else:
        results[filename] = matches

# Print results
for filename in subcategory_files:
    if filename not in results or not results[filename]:
        continue
    
    print\(f"\\nFILE: {filename}"\)
    cards = results[filename]
    
    # Check if all cards use the same image
    images = [card[2] for card in cards]
    unique_images = set\(images\)
    
    for card in cards:
        if card[0]:  # Has ID
            print\(f"  {card[0]} -> current: {card[2].split\('/'\)[-1]}"\)
        else:  # No ID, use href or alt
            product_name = card[1].replace\('.html', ''\).split\('-'\)[-1] if card[1] else card[3]
            print\(f"  {product_name} -> current: {card[2].split\('/'\)[-1]}"\)

PYSCRIPT)

#!/bin/bash

files=\(
  "spices-whole-spices.html"
  "spices-powdered-spices.html"
  "spices-mixed-spices.html"
  "rice-basmati-rice.html"

  "pulses-whole-pulses.html"
  "pulses-split-pulses.html"
  "herbs-leaves-flowers.html"
  "herbs-roots-rhizomes.html"
  "herbs-seeds.html"
  "herbs-seeds-babchi.html"
  "herbs-fruits-pods.html"
  "herbs-other.html"
  "herbs-other-catechu.html"
  "herbs-other-himej.html"
  "dry-fruits-raisins.html"
  "dry-fruits-cashews.html"
  "dry-fruits-walnuts.html"
  "dry-fruits-nutmeg.html"
  "cereals-flour-cereals.html"
  "cereals-flour-flour.html"

  "dehydrated-products-powder.html"
  "animal-feed-other.html"
  "animal-feed-millets.html"
  "coffee-coffee-beans.html"

\)

for file in "${files[@]}"; do

    echo "FILE: $file"
    cat "$file" | sed 's/<a id=/\\n<a id=/g' | grep '<a id=' | while read line; do
      id=$\(echo "$line" | sed -n 's/.*<a id="\\\([^"]*\\\).*/\\1/p'\)
      src=$\(echo "$line" | sed -n 's/.*src="\\\([^"]*\\\)".*/\\1/p' | sed 's/.*\\///'\)
      if [ -n "$id" ] && [ -n "$src" ]; then
        echo "  $id -> current: $src"
      fi
    done
  fi
done

Bash(cat > /tmp/full_detailed_analysis.sh << 'BASHEOF'
#!/bin/bash

files=\(
  "spices-whole-spices.html"
  "spices-powdered-spices.html"
  "spices-mixed-spices.html"
  "rice-basmati-rice.html"
  "rice-non-basmati-rice.html"
  "oil-seeds-groundnuts.html"
  "pulses-whole-pulses.html"
  "pulses-split-pulses.html"
  "herbs-leaves-flowers.html"
  "herbs-roots-rhizomes.html"
  "herbs-seeds.html"
  "herbs-seeds-babchi.html"
  "herbs-fruits-pods.html"
  "herbs-other.html"
  "herbs-other-catechu.html"
  "herbs-other-himej.html"
  "dry-fruits-raisins.html"
  "dry-fruits-cashews.html"
  "dry-fruits-walnuts.html"
  "dry-fruits-nutmeg.html"
  "cereals-flour-cereals.html"
  "cereals-flour-flour.html"
  "food-chemicals-food-additives.html"
  "dehydrated-products-whole.html"
  "dehydrated-products-powder.html"
  "animal-feed-other.html"
  "animal-feed-millets.html"
  "coffee-coffee-beans.html"
  "coffee-instant-coffee.html"
\)

for file in "${files[@]}"; do
  if [ -f "$file" ]; then
    # First, get cards with IDs
    cardcount=$\(cat "$file" | sed 's/<a id=/\\n<a id=/g' | grep '<a id=' | wc -l\)
    
    # Then, get cards without IDs
    cardcountno=$\(cat "$file" | sed 's/<a /\\n<a /g' | grep 'class="pm-card"' | grep -v 'id=' | wc -l\)
    
    if [ "$cardcount" -gt 0 ] || [ "$cardcountno" -gt 0 ]; then
      echo "FILE: $file"
      
      # Cards with IDs
      cat "$file" | sed 's/<a id=/\\n<a id=/g' | grep '<a id=' | while read line; do
        id=$\(echo "$line" | sed -n 's/.*<a id="\\\([^"]*\\\).*/\\1/p'\)
        src=$\(echo "$line" | sed -n 's/.*src="\\\([^"]*\\\)".*/\\1/p' | sed 's/.*\\///'\)
        if [ -n "$id" ] && [ -n "$src" ]; then
          echo "  $id -> current: $src"
        fi
      done
      
      # Cards without IDs \(use href product name\)
      cat "$file" | sed 's/<a /\\n<a /g' | grep 'class="pm-card"' | grep -v 'id=' | while read line; do
        href=$\(echo "$line" | sed -n 's/.*href="\\\([^"]*\\\)".*/\\1/p' | sed 's/.html.*//' | sed 's/.*-//'\)
        src=$\(echo "$line" | sed -n 's/.*src="\\\([^"]*\\\)".*/\\1/p' | sed 's/.*\\///'\)
        if [ -n "$href" ] && [ -n "$src" ]; then
          echo "  $href -> current: $src"
        fi
      done
    fi
  fi
done
BASHEOF

chmod +x /tmp/full_detailed_analysis.sh
/tmp/full_detailed_analysis.sh)

Bash(cd C:/users/aagos/radiance_page_generators/generators/public_html && python -c "
import json

with open\('data/radiance_full_hierarchy.json', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    hier = json.load\(f\)

def show\(node, depth=0, max_depth=3\):
    if depth > max_depth: return
    name = node.get\('name',''\)
    fname = node.get\('file',''\)
    children = node.get\('children', []\)
    print\('  '*depth + f'{name} -> {fname} \(children={len\(children\)}\)'\)
    for c in children[:3]:
        show\(c, depth+1, max_depth\)
    if len\(children\) > 3:
        print\('  '*\(depth+1\) + f'... and {len\(children\)-3} more'\)

for cat in hier[:2]:
    show\(cat\)
    print\(\)
")

Title m = re.search\(r'\(.*?\)', content\) result['title'] = m.group\(1\).strip\(\) if m else '' # H1 m = re.search\(r']*>\(.*?\)', content, re.DOTALL\) result['h1'] = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', m.group\(1\)\).strip\(\) if m else '' # page-breadcrumb nav m = re.search\(r'class="page-breadcrumb"[^>]*>\(.*?\)', content, re.DOTALL\) if m: items = re.findall\(r'class="bc-\(?:link|current\)"[^>]*>\(.*?\) '.join\([re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>','',x\).strip\(\) for x in items]\) else: result['page_bc'] = '' # sp-breadcrumb m = re.search\(r'class="sp-breadcrumb"[^>]*>\(.*?\)', content, re.DOTALL\) if m: items = re.findall\(r']*>\(.*?\)', m.group\(1\), re.DOTALL\) result['sp_bc'] = ' > '.join\([re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>','',x\).strip\(\) for x in items if re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>','',x\).strip\(\) not in ['/', '›', '']]\) else: result['sp_bc'] = '' # eyebrow text m = re.search\(r'class="[^"]*eyebrow[^"]*"[^>]*>\(.*?\)]+>', content, re.DOTALL\) result['eyebrow'] = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', m.group\(1\)\).strip\(\) if m else '' # sp-keynote m = re.search\(r'class="sp-keynote"[^>]*>\(.*?\)]+>', content, re.DOTALL\) result['keynote'] = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', m.group\(1\)\).strip\(\) if m else '' # ai-context section m = re.search\(r'class="ai-context"[^>]*>\(.*?\)]+>', '', m.group\(1\)\).strip\(\)[:300] if m else '' # section headings \(h2, h3\) h2s = re.findall\(r']*>\(.*?\)', content, re.DOTALL\) result['h2s'] = [re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>','',x\).strip\(\) for x in h2s[:5]] # category labels / section labels cat_labels = re.findall\(r'class="[^"]*\(?:cat-label|section-label|category-label\)[^"]*"[^>]*>\(.*?\)]+>', content, re.DOTALL\) result['cat_labels'] = [re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>','',x\).strip\(\) for x in cat_labels] return result # Process all target files categories = ['dry-fruits', 'dehydrated-products', 'cereals-flour', 'food-chemicals'] all_files = [] for cat in categories: files = sorted\(glob.glob\(f"{BASE}/{cat}*.html"\)\) all_files.extend\(files\) for filepath in all_files: fname = os.path.basename\(filepath\) data = extract_fields\(filepath\) print\(f"\\n{'='*60}"\) print\(f"FILE: {fname}"\) print\(f"TITLE: {data['title']}"\) print\(f"H1: {data['h1']}"\) print\(f"PAGE_BC: {data['page_bc']}"\) print\(f"SP_BC: {data['sp_bc']}"\) if data['eyebrow']: print\(f"EYEBROW: {data['eyebrow']}"\) if data['keynote']: print\(f"KEYNOTE: {data['keynote']}"\) if data['h2s']: print\(f"H2s: {data['h2s']}"\) if data['ai_context']: print\(f"AI_CTX: {data['ai_context'][:200]}"\) PYEOF)
